indication: ENHERTU (trastuzumab deruxtecan) as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable, locally advanced or metastatic HER2-positive gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma who have received a prior trastuzumab-based regimen.
description: Health Canada approved trastuzumab deruxtecan as a monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable,locally advanced or metastatic HER2-positive gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma who have received a prior trastuzumab-based regimen.
raw_cancer_type: unresectable locally advanced or metastatic gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma
